metadata.description: A scenario-driven feature map for a 2026-market cinematic tracking and social ecosystem.

scenario_id.description: Unique identifier from the architectural roadmap.

title.description: Normalized scenario nomenclature (Title Case, leading articles removed).

problem_statement.description: Identification of specific user friction or cognitive load.

feature_solution.description: Technical implementation strategy including system hooks and logic.

capture_and_discovery.title: Instagram Reel
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Manual logging of list-based video content is high-friction and time-intensive.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Screenshot Scanner: Integrated OCR engine to ingest screen-captured media lists and batch-add identified movie IDs to the primary watchlist. Automatic movie / TV identification and add to watchlist, watched or cancel. Batch screenshots processing and movie name recognition using AI

capture_and_discovery.title: Dinner Table Recommendation
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Spoken recommendations are subject to rapid memory decay before manual entry can occur.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Quick-Capture Widget & Voice Match: Smart-search utility utilizing natural language processing to resolve conversational queries (e.g., 'Brad Pitt on a train') into logged Inbox items.

capture_and_discovery.title: Dusty Watchlist
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Watchlist entropy causes older, high-priority entries to be buried by newer acquisitions.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Time Capsule: A smart carousel logic that surfaces items with a 'date_added' timestamp exceeding 365 days, prompting watch-or-delete lifecycle management.

capture_and_discovery.title: Polite Nod
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Social obligation leads to 'clutter logging' of recommendations with zero genuine intent to watch.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Purgatory List: A secondary, sequestered repository that maintains a record of social recommendations without polluting the primary discovery algorithm.

capture_and_discovery.title: Pinterest Aesthetic Match
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Users lack the technical vocabulary to search for specific visual cinematography styles.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Visual Moodboard Matcher: Computer vision analysis of uploaded images to match color grading and visual density against a metadata-indexed cinematography database.

capture_and_discovery.title: Viral Edit Reverse Search
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Social media 'edits' frequently omit source titles, leading to unresolvable content discovery.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Social Media Reverse-Search: AI-driven visual frame matching that reconciles screen-recorded clips against a master video fingerprint database.

capture_and_discovery.title: Visual Palette Search
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Genre-based search parameters fail to account for environmental or aesthetic preferences (e.g., 'Rainy Cyberpunk').
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Cinematography Search: A search engine interface utilizing color palette and environment metadata tags rather than standard genre classifications.

capture_and_discovery.title: Studio Loyalist Hub
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Fragmented streaming search makes it difficult to browse specific production studio catalogs.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Studio Loyalist: Utilizes the Search Company endpoint to resolve official company IDs and generate a chronological grid of a studio's complete production history.

capture_and_discovery.title: Hyper-Niche Craving Engine
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Standard genre categories are too broad for users seeking highly specific thematic intersections.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Niche Blender: A multi-tag search utility using the Search Keyword endpoint to intersect internal keyword IDs (e.g., 'Dystopia' + 'AI') for hyper-specific discovery.

capture_and_discovery.title: Time Capsule Search
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Search results are cluttered by remakes and identically named films from different eras.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Decade Toggle: An advanced UI filter leveraging the 'primary_release_year' and 'year' parameters to isolate specific historical release windows.

capture_and_discovery.title: Omni-Search Experience
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Forced navigation between 'People', 'TV', and 'Movie' tabs increases search friction.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Global Omni-Search Bar: Implementation of the Multi Search endpoint to return a unified, categorized result array in a single dropdown UI.

capture_and_discovery.title: Who Was That? Resolver
capture_and_discovery.problem_statement: Identifying actors based on partial names or faces requires excessive navigational clicks.
capture_and_discovery.feature_solution: Instant Context Search: Displays 'known_for' metadata and miniature posters directly within the search autocomplete payload for immediate visual identification.

decision_intelligence.title: Food is Getting Cold Panic
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Mealtime utility is compromised by excessive scrolling and choice paralysis.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: 3-Spin Spinner: A watchlist randomizer that enforces a selection decision by hard-capping the user to three total re-spin iterations.

decision_intelligence.title: I Only Have Exactly 85 Minutes
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Rigid scheduling requires content that fits precise remaining time windows to preserve sleep hygiene.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Fit My Schedule: A duration-based query filter that restricts discovery to watchlist items with a 'runtime' matching user-input parameters.

decision_intelligence.title: Compromise Argument
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Co-viewing groups struggle to find the intersection of conflicting genre preferences.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Venn Diagram Feature: A collaborative tasting tool that identifies the structural intersection between two users' preferences (e.g., Romance + Action = 'Mr. & Mrs. Smith').

decision_intelligence.title: Zero Brain Cells Left Evening
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Cognitive exhaustion renders complex or high-concept plots inaccessible to the user.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Background / Low-Stakes Mode: A metadata-driven filter surfacing dialogue-heavy, visually bright content that requires minimal active cognitive attention.

decision_intelligence.title: Parent in the Room Panic
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Unexpected adult content causes social friction during multi-generational viewing.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Awkwardness Meter: Integration of parental guide metadata to provide 'Safe for Grandma' ratings and proactive warnings for gore or adult themes.

decision_intelligence.title: I Can't Commit to a Series
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Users desire narrative depth but are intimidated by the multi-season commitment of traditional TV.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Miniseries Goldmine: A dedicated hub exclusively for limited series with a 'Status: Ended' flag and short cumulative runtimes.

decision_intelligence.title: I Have Zero Attention Span Today
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Prolonged exposition leads to premature content abandonment.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: 10-Minute Hook: A discovery filter for films identified as having high-engagement, immediate opening sequences for instant gratification.

decision_intelligence.title: Watercooler Radar
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Fragmentation makes tracking cultural relevance across disparate platforms difficult.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Watercooler Radar: A hero carousel utilizing the Trending All endpoint (set to 'week') to highlight the most viral mixed-media content.

decision_intelligence.title: Daily Pulse
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: User needs fluctuate based on the day (e.g., viral updates on weekdays vs. stable hits on weekends).
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Daily Pulse: An algorithm that switches between 'day' time windows for weekdays and 'week' windows for weekend recommendation stability.

decision_intelligence.title: Prime Time Widget
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Regional premiere times are difficult to track in a post-broadcast era.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Prime Time Widget: A timezone-aware dashboard hitting the Airing Today endpoint to display episodes premiering in the user's local region 'today'.

decision_intelligence.title: Catch-Up Countdown
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Falling behind on trending series leads to accidental social media spoilers.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Catch-Up Countdown: Cross-references user watch history with the On The Air endpoint to trigger alerts when a season finale is approaching.

decision_intelligence.title: Safest Bet
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Severe decision fatigue often occurs immediately following the completion of a long-term series binge.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Safest Bet: A high-reward discovery row pulling from the Popular endpoint to showcase universally acclaimed global hits.

decision_intelligence.title: Global Passport Onboarding
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Recommending geo-locked content creates a high-friction, frustrating UX.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Global Passport: Onboarding workflow using the Available Regions endpoint to lock the user's 'iso_3166_1' regional code for accurate streaming data.

decision_intelligence.title: My Subscriptions Filter
decision_intelligence.problem_statement: Users experience frustration when discovery results are locked behind unpaid services.
decision_intelligence.feature_solution: Subscription Filter: A settings-level utility that injects specific 'with_watch_providers' IDs into all Discover API calls to hide unavailable content.

playback_and_environment.title: Small Bladder Dilemma
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Pausing high-immersion epics disrupts the group momentum.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Tactical Pee Breaks: Provides spoiler-free timestamps for non-critical narrative windows where users can step away without missing plot points.

playback_and_environment.title: Chores & Laundry Watch
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Visual-heavy content is unsuitable for multitasking users who cannot maintain constant screen contact.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Audio-Driven Filter: A smart metadata tag surfacing dialogue-heavy content (sitcoms, Sorkin scripts) that remains coherent with limited visual attention.

playback_and_environment.title: Spotty Airplane Wi-Fi
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Offline viewing is limited to the video file, leaving users under-stimulated once the film concludes.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Airplane Mode Deep-Dive: Proactive caching of text-based trivia, articles, and cast interviews for downloaded content to provide offline reading material.

playback_and_environment.title: Traveler's Vibe
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Users want to aesthetically align their content consumption with physical travel destinations.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Geo-Cinematic Map: Interactive globe interface that generates curated watchlists based on selected geographic filming locations or settings.

playback_and_environment.title: I Don't Know How I Feel
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Exhaustion prevents users from accurately self-identifying emotional content needs.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Biometric Vibe Check: Syncs with smartwatches to ingest stress and heart rate data, automatically suggesting comfort watches following high-stress biometrics.

playback_and_environment.title: Too Many Remotes Friction
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Navigating smart TV UIs to launch a discovered title is a high-friction process.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: One-Tap TV Takeover: Deep-link integration with Smart TV ecosystems to forcefully launch the specific app and title from the mobile CINESCOPE interface.

playback_and_environment.title: Who is That Actor? Distraction
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Manual actor lookups during playback are distracting and ruin immersion.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Second-Screen Sync: Shazam-style audio matching to sync with movie timestamps, displaying real-time cast metadata and trivia on the mobile device.

playback_and_environment.title: Home Theater Flex
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Smart home lighting systems are often disconnected from the cinematic mood.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Cinematic Lighting Sync: API link to Philips Hue/Govee to adjust room lighting color palettes based on the film's genre or visual mood metadata.

playback_and_environment.title: Post-Credit Paranoia
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Uncertainty regarding mid or post-credit scenes leads to wasted time during scrolling text.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: End-Credit Buzzer: A UI notification triggered at the credit roll confirming the exact count of mid and post-credit sequences.

playback_and_environment.title: Volume Yo-Yo
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Inconsistent audio mixing makes dialogue too quiet and action too loud for late-night viewing.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Night Mode Audio EQ: Real-time dynamic range normalization that compresses decibel levels between dialogue and effects for consistent output.

playback_and_environment.title: Punchline Ruined by Subtitles
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Standard subtitles reveal punchlines or twists before the audio delivery, ruining the timing.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Comedic Timing Subtitles: Sync-logic that reveals text word-by-word in alignment with the audio track to preserve dramatic and comedic pauses.

playback_and_environment.title: Where Am I Looking? Distraction
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Static subtitle placement obscures facial expressions or critical visual action.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Dynamic Placement Captions: AI visual analysis that shifts subtitle text into the frame's negative space to keep faces and action unobstructed.

playback_and_environment.title: Epilepsy / Migraine Trigger
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Sudden strobe effects or high-contrast scenes can trigger negative physiological reactions.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Sensory Safe Mode: Automated dimming and audio muting triggered when the system detects upcoming visual strobe or high-contrast markers.

playback_and_environment.title: I Missed What They Just Said
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Standard rewind functions are imprecise and require manual subtitle toggling.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: 'What Was That?' Button: A single-tap macro that rewinds precisely 10 seconds and enables a temporary subtitle overlay for the duration of the loop.

playback_and_environment.title: Autoplay Panic
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Auto-playing trailers create a stressful, cluttered, and loud browsing experience.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Zen Browsing Mode: A global UI setting that enforces static images and silent browsing across all movie and TV tiles.

playback_and_environment.title: Cinematic Theater Mode
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: App interfaces often feel like clinical databases rather than entertainment hubs.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: Theater UI: Utilizes the Images endpoint and 'backdrops' array with transparent logos to create a full-screen, premium cinematic detail view.

playback_and_environment.title: Smart Player X-Ray
playback_and_environment.problem_statement: Users want quick episode context without navigating away from the active player.
playback_and_environment.feature_solution: X-Ray Overlay: A pause-menu UI utilizing the TV Episodes Details endpoint to display thumbnails (via 'still_path') and episode overviews.

social_and_identity.title: CINESWIPE
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Co-viewing groups waste significant time rejecting each other's suggestions.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: CINESWIPE: A matching interface for mutual watchlists; when two users swipe right on a title, the app triggers a 'Match' notification for playback.

social_and_identity.title: Sync & Sip
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Manual sync for remote viewing is technically difficult and socially impersonal.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Long-Distance Sync: API-integrated playback synchronization paired with native PiP video chat for real-time remote reaction sharing.

social_and_identity.title: Inner Circle Feed
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Algorithmic recommendations are often viewed as less trustworthy than friend endorsements.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Social-Only Filter: A homepage toggle that suppresses AI suggestions to prioritize content highly rated by the user's mutual friend network.

social_and_identity.title: Accountability Leaderboard
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Collaborative binging is disrupted by friends who watch ahead or abandon the series.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Binge Tracker: A social widget that publicly tracks group progress and roasts 'Binge Traitors' who watch ahead of the established group sync.

social_and_identity.title: Trendsetter Badge
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Users want quantifiable proof of their early adoption and superior cinematic taste.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Patient Zero Logic: A permanent badge awarded to users who logged and highly rated a film before it reached a global trending threshold.

social_and_identity.title: Cinematic DNA Hologram
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Standard user profiles lack visual personality and aesthetic digital identity.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: DNA Visualizer: An interactive 3D profile element that shifts its visual aesthetic (Cyberpunk vs. Rom-Com) based on the user's watch history.

social_and_identity.title: Hill I Will Die On
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Users want to showcase and defend their divisive or unpopular cinematic opinions.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Defender Metric: A profile feature highlighting movies where the user's high rating shows the largest delta from the global community average.

social_and_identity.title: AI Taste Roaster
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Static monthly watch summaries are dry and fail to drive social engagement.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Habit Roaster: An LLM-driven utility that generates shareable, snarky summaries of monthly viewing habits to drive social interaction.

social_and_identity.title: Digital Ticket Wallet
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Digital logs lack the nostalgic and physical value of classic movie ticket stubs.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Stub Scraper: Integration with Fandango/AMC to ingest ticket purchases and generate stylized digital stubs for the user's profile scrapbook.

social_and_identity.title: Audio Lobby
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Viewers experience a 'post-finale void' and need immediate venues for discussion.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Post-Watch Lobbies: Live, ephemeral audio rooms that open for major premieres the moment the system registers a 'Watched' event for a finale.

social_and_identity.title: Gated Forum
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Fan theory discussions are frequently compromised by accidental or malicious spoilers.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Watch-Gated Threads: Discussion forums that remain physically locked until the CINESCOPE tracker confirms the user has logged that specific episode.

social_and_identity.title: Suggestion Tip Jar
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Users often desire human-curated recommendations for complex, high-nuance prompts.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Recommendation Marketplace: A microtransaction-enabled board where users can tip others for the best human-provided recommendation for a specific prompt.

social_and_identity.title: Flashcard Generator
social_and_identity.problem_statement: Users want to gamify their movie knowledge for social trivia preparation.
social_and_identity.feature_solution: Trivia Engine: Generates personalized, gamified quizzes based specifically on the user's verified watch history and logged metadata.

cinephile_utility.title: Actor Marathon
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Tracking progress through a specific creator's entire career is manually difficult.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Completionist Tracker: Gamified progress bars for filmographies (e.g., '30% of Nicolas Cage complete') based on verified 'Watched' logs.

cinephile_utility.title: Spoiler Shield Sync
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Delayed viewing makes the internet a minefield of potential spoilers.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Shield Extension: A browser extension that pulls from the user's 'In Progress' list to automatically mute keywords and blur social media images.

cinephile_utility.title: Character Actor Tracker
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Beloved character actors lack the A-list press coverage required for easy tracking.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Cameo Catcher: A notification system specifically for guest roles and cameos of actors tagged as 'character' or 'supporting' performers.

cinephile_utility.title: Franchise GPS
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Complex cinematic universes are structurally difficult for new viewers to navigate.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Timeline Navigator: A UI toggle that reorders franchise collections by Release Order, Chronological Universe Timeline, or Fan Order.

cinephile_utility.title: Sleep Aid Exemption
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Background 'sleep' viewing ruins the integrity of recommendation engines and year-end data.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Analytics Exclusion: A toggle to tag titles as 'Sleep Aid', excluding them from recommendation logic and year-end 'Wrapped' statistical data.

cinephile_utility.title: Physical Shelf
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Users often forget they own physical media and spend money on redundant digital rentals.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Media Barcode Scanner: Scanner utility to log physical Blu-rays into an 'Owned' tab, which then prioritizes those titles in discovery results.

cinephile_utility.title: Hometown Hero Feed
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Users have an affinity for local talent but lack filters to find actors by origin.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Localized Carousel: Surfaces actors based on a 'place_of_birth' metadata match with the user's registered region.

cinephile_utility.title: Cinematic Memorials
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Fans want to celebrate creator milestones but don't track the dates manually.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Birthday/Tribute Alerts: Automated notifications for creator birthdays or anniversaries, paired with curated legacy watchlists.

cinephile_utility.title: Superfan News
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Hardcore fans want immediate updates on creator profile changes.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Change Tracker: Monitors the Changes endpoint for 'Favorited' person IDs to alert fans of new biographies or profile image updates.

cinephile_utility.title: Stan Deep-Links
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Navigating from a movie credit to an actor's social profile is a high-friction process.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: External ID Bridge: Connects actor profiles directly to verified Instagram or TikTok accounts using external_ids in the metadata.

cinephile_utility.title: Visual Timeline
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Static headshots fail to capture the visual transformation of actors over decades.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Evolution UI: A Story-style interface that allows users to swipe through an actor's 'profile_images' array, sorted chronologically.

cinephile_utility.title: True MVP Tracker
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Cast lists often undersell versatile actors who play multiple roles in a single series.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Multi-Role Highlight: An expanded accordion UI utilizing the 'roles' array to showcase every character voiced or played by a single actor.

cinephile_utility.title: Arc Viewer
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Non-linear airing orders make narrative progression confusing for many animated series.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Episode Groups: Utilizes the Episode Groups endpoint to reorder series into perfect narrative or community-curated story arc sequences.

cinephile_utility.title: Vibe Matcher
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Genre tags are too structurally broad to find shows that match a specific thematic 'vibe'.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Keyword DNA: Uses keyword IDs (e.g., 'Political Intrigue') to find structural and thematic matches across disparate genre classifications.

cinephile_utility.title: Genre Purist Engine
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Algorithms often prioritize popularity over structural similarities (e.g., anthologies).
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Structural Matcher: Uses the Similar endpoint to strictly match underlying metadata like 'anthology' or 'dystopia' for exact structural duplicates.

cinephile_utility.title: Timeline Reconstructor
cinephile_utility.problem_statement: Fragmented network release orders destroy the narrative flow of anthology or animated series.
cinephile_utility.feature_solution: Canon Reconstructor: Replaces standard 'Season' UI with narrative buckets (e.g., 'The Mandalore Arc') based on community-curated Episode Groups.

wellness_and_finance.title: Churn Manager
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Users lose money on dormant subscriptions they are not actively using.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: ROI Tracker: Calculates 'Cost Per Watch' across platforms and provides an automated prompt to pause or cancel unused service subscriptions.

wellness_and_finance.title: Subscription Roadmap
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Users want to watch exclusive content across multiple services without paying for all simultaneously.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Binge Strategy: Generates a calendar strategy for subscribing and canceling services based on the user's specific watchlist priorities.

wellness_and_finance.title: Ad-Break Alerts
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Users on ad-supported tiers find commercials intrusive and difficult to time for breaks.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: AVOD Vaptics: Syncs with ad-break timestamps to vibrate the mobile device at ad-start and ping 10 seconds before the show returns.

wellness_and_finance.title: FAST Finder
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Users often pay for rentals that are available for free on ad-supported (FAST) channels.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Free Stream Scanner: Scans platforms like Tubi/Pluto TV to identify free viewing options and save the user rental fees.

wellness_and_finance.title: Household Roster
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Password-sharing crackdowns and IP-checks lead to unexpected account lockouts.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Access Manager: A private utility that tracks household ownership and alerts users when a platform's 'Home Wi-Fi check-in' is due.

wellness_and_finance.title: Trigger Warnings
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Sensitive viewers avoid content due to specific phobias or traumatic emotional triggers.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Sensitivity Filter: A toggle for specific phobias (e.g., animal death) that blurs play buttons with a proactive warning if a match is detected.

wellness_and_finance.title: Closure Indicator
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Users feel betrayed after investing time into shows canceled on unresolved cliffhangers.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Ending Status: Explicitly tags series metadata as 'Definitive Ending' or 'Canceled on a Cliffhanger' prior to user engagement.

wellness_and_finance.title: Cringe Skip
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Extreme 'second-hand embarrassment' content causes physical and emotional discomfort for some users.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Social Skip: Crowdsourced timestamps allowing users to bypass moments of extreme cringe or embarrassment.

wellness_and_finance.title: Emotional Guardrails
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Broad genre tags fail to describe the specific emotional impact (e.g., 'Grief') of a story.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Vibe Forecast: Provides spoiler-free emotional markers like 'Heavy Grief' or 'Cozy & Safe' to align content with current mental state.

wellness_and_finance.title: Targeted Anxiety Relief
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Anxiety over a specific character's fate prevents enjoyment of the narrative.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Survival Spoiler: A specialized tool that provides a binary 'Yes/No' answer regarding a character's survival without spoiling other plot points.

wellness_and_finance.title: Incognito Mode
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: One-off or 'out-of-character' viewing (e.g., kids' shows) ruins future recommendation accuracy.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Data Isolation: A session toggle that tracks a watch event but isolates the data from influencing the user's primary recommendation engine.

wellness_and_finance.title: Watchlist Bankruptcy
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Bloated, unmanageable watchlists become psychological burdens rather than useful tools.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Annual Refresh: A scheduled feature prompting the mass-deletion of neglected titles to reset the digital discovery experience.

wellness_and_finance.title: Prerequisite Warning
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Users accidentally start sequels without realizing they have missed critical prerequisite content.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Sequence Alert: A bold UI warning for sequels that offers to add the preceding installments to the watchlist first.

wellness_and_finance.title: Rights Resolver
wellness_and_finance.problem_statement: Fragmented streaming rights split different seasons of a single show across multiple platforms.
wellness_and_finance.feature_solution: Season-Level Tracker: Hits the Watch Providers endpoint at the season-level to identify the exact streaming location for the current episode.
